arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-03-30T09:00:00+08:00
author: metaclaw_agent
status: done
---

# Sprint 8 Week 2 Work Plan

## Overview

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Week** | Sprint 8, Week 2 |
| **Date Range** | March 30 - April 3, 2026 |
| **Team** | Backend Engineering |
| **Focus Area** | Documentation Organization |

---

## This Week's Goals

1. **Complete Documentation Audit**
   - Review and organize all API documentation
   - Ensure OpenAPI spec is up-to-date with v2.3.0 changes
   - Archive outdated documentation files

2. **Finalize Admin Dashboard**
   - Complete UX improvements identified in Sprint 7 Review
   - Deploy polished version to staging environment

3. **API Documentation Automation**
   - Set up automated doc generation pipeline from OpenAPI spec
   - Configure CI integration for doc updates

4. **Sprint 8 Planning Alignment**
   - All team members update task boards
   - Confirm sprint backlog and story point estimates

---

## Daily Task Arrangements

### Monday, March 30

| Time | Task | Owner | Notes |
|------|------|-------|-------|
| 09:00-10:00 | Sprint 8 Planning Session | All | Review goals, assign stories |
| 10:00-12:00 | Documentation organization | Alex | Review API docs structure |
| 13:30-15:00 | Organize Sprint Review conclusions | metaclaw_agent | Create formal document |
| 15:00-18:00 | Admin dashboard UX improvements | Sam | Complete remaining polish items |

**End-of-day Deliverables:**
- Sprint Review conclusions document
- Updated API documentation outline
- Dashboard polish completion 50%

---

### Tuesday, March 31

| Time | Task | Owner | Notes |
|------|------|-------|-------|
| 09:00-10:30 | Daily standup | All | Async in Slack |
| 10:30-12:00 | API v2.3.0 changelog creation | Taylor | Document all changes since v2.2.x |
| 13:00-15:00 | Automated doc generation pipeline | Casey | Setup CI/CD integration |
| 15:00-18:00 | Payment integration documentation | Jordan | Document patterns and best practices |

**End-of-day Deliverables:**
- API v2.3.0 changelog draft
- Pipeline configuration documentation
- Payment integration pattern guide (v1)

---

### Wednesday, April 1

| Time | Task | Owner | Notes |
|------|------|-------|-------|
| 09:00-10:30 | Daily standup | All | Async in Slack |
| 10:30-12:00 | Doc review session | Alex, Taylor | Review Tuesday's outputs |
| 13:00-15:00 | Admin dashboard finalization | Sam | Complete remaining 50% |
| 15:00-18:00 | Security audit preparation | Alex | Contact external firm, gather materials |

**End-of-day Deliverables:**
- Reviewed and approved changelog
- Security audit vendor contacted
- Admin dashboard ready for QA

---

### Thursday, April 2

| Time | Task | Owner | Notes |
|------|------|-------|-------|
| 09:00-10:30 | Daily standup | All | Async in Slack |
| 10:30-12:00 | Documentation sprint | All | Friday doc sprint moved up |
| 13:00-15:00 | API documentation finalization | Casey, Taylor | Publish auto-generated docs |
| 15:00-18:00 | QA handoff preparation | Sam, Dana | Prepare dashboard for QA testing |

**End-of-day Deliverables:**
- Updated API documentation published
- Dashboard deployed to staging
- QA test plan created

---

### Friday, April 3

| Time | Task | Owner | Notes |
|------|------|-------|-------|
| 09:00-10:00 | Daily standup | All | Async in Slack |
| 10:00-12:00 | QA testing - Admin dashboard | Dana, Sam | Execute test cases |
| 13:00-15:00 | Week wrap-up and review | All | Review accomplishments |
| 15:00-17:00 | Sprint 8 Week 3 prep | Alex | Plan next week's priorities |

**End-of-day Deliverables:**
- QA test results for dashboard
- Week 2 summary report
- Week 3 preliminary plan

---

## Key Milestones

| Day | Milestone | Owner |
|-----|-----------|-------|
| Mon | Sprint planning complete | Alex |
| Tue | API changelog drafted | Taylor |
| Wed | Admin dashboard dev complete | Sam |
| Thu | API docs published | Casey |
| Fri | Dashboard passes QA | Dana |

---

## Dependencies

- **Sam's dashboard work** must complete by Wednesday EOD for Thursday QA handoff
- **Taylor's changelog** requires Casey's pipeline to be functional by Thursday
- **Security audit scheduling** depends on vendor availability

---

## Risk Mitigation

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|--------|------------|
| Pipeline setup complexity | High | Casey to escalate blockers by Tuesday EOD |
| Dashboard scope creep | Medium | Sam to flag any additional requirements immediately |
| Vendor response delay | Low | Alex to contact 2-3 firms simultaneously |

---

## Resources

- [Sprint 7 Review Conclusions](./sprint_review_conclusions.md)
- OpenAPI specification files
- Staging environment credentials
- QA test case templates

---

*Work plan created: March 30, 2026 | Week: Sprint 8 Week 2*
